---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/coyotespeaks.bsky.social
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X, the Everything App
      href: https://x.com/coyotejacques
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:Coyote.Speaks@gmail.com

---

My name is Jack LaRoche (they/them). Folklorist, animal rehabber, and werewolf enthusiast.
